source.title: Where Can I Play Star Atlas?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

primary_sources.anchor_text: PLAY - The Gateway to the Star Atlas Ecosystem

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “Where Can I Play Star Atlas?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Star Atlas is a universe of interconnected products spanning web, blockchain, and 3D gaming
MMORPG UE5 Game (Epic Games)
Explore the Star Atlas universe in full 3D using Unreal Engine 5
Fly your ships or demo ships
Use crew avatars to walk, fight, or race
Mine asteroids and navigate open space
Join multiplayer combat and racing matches
Free to play (requires a game key via Discord)
Available in pre-alpha via closed access (Epic Games)Join by requesting a game key in the Star Atlas Discord
SAGE Labs Starbased (sage.staratlas.com)
A browser-based, fully on-chain strategy game built on Solana.
Explore space and discover regions of the Galia Expanse
Mine, refine, and craft resources
Manage fleets, fuel logistics, and trade routes
Earn through gameplay or rent ships to other players
Every action is an on-chain transaction
🔗 Learn more about SAGE
PLAY - The Gateway to the Star Atlas Ecosystem
play.staratlas.com is the central hub for interacting with most features in Star Atlas. From here, you can manage your assets, trade NFTs, access Faction Claim, Fleet Rental, your DAC, and more.
Fleet Rental
Create fleets in SAGE and rent them out for passive income
Marketplace
Buy and sell ships, crew, claim stakes, resources, and collectibles using ATLAS or USDC.
Faction Claim
Enlist Claim Stakes to produce R4 resources (fuel, food, ammo, toolkits) over time.
Inventory
View and manage your NFTs.
DAC PlatformCreate or join a guild (Decentralized Autonomous Corporation), customize your org, and recruit players.
Graphic Novel
Explore the official Star Atlas lore through the "CORE" digital comic
Faction Fleet
Stake ships to earn passive ATLAS rewards.
🔗 Explore Play.StarAtlas.com
Governance (govern.staratlas.com)
Shape the future of Star Atlas through on-chain governance.
POLIS Locker
Lock POLIS to gain voting power (PVP) and earn daily POLIS rewards.
ATLAS Locker
Lock ATLAS to reduce marketplace fees and earn POLIS rewards.
Proposals
Submit or vote on governance proposals (PIPs) that influence DAO operations, treasury, and ecosystem policy.
🔗 Explore DAO governance
